MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on THUR-FEB-14-2013:
Plaintiff MAGNE L. VEIMOEN is present with Attorney David Foran
Defendants ALEX GILBERT and KENDRA BATTLES are present with Attorney Thomas Y. Lee representing the defendants though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case does not settle. The trial date of FEB-19-2013 remains on calendar.
